hero.title: The Complete AI Platform for Building the Future
hero.subtitle: Build, integrate, automate, and deploy AI from one powerful platform. Murphy brings together AI models, intelligent agents, workflows, APIs, prompts, and developer tools into a single ecosystem.

about.title: What is Murphy?
about.description: Murphy is a unified AI ecosystem built for developers, businesses, startups, creators, students, and enterprises. Whether you need an AI chatbot, image generation, document processing, workflow automation, or AI integration for your application, Murphy provides everything you need in one place. Connect your preferred AI provider or use Murphy AI to build intelligent solutions faster.

features.title: Everything You Need to Build with AI

items.title: Murphy AI
items.description: An intelligent assistant for reasoning, coding, research, writing, planning, and problem solving.

items.title: AI Model Hub
items.description: Access multiple AI providers through one unified interface.

items.title: AI Agents
items.description: Create autonomous AI agents capable of completing complex tasks.

items.title: Prompt Library
items.description: Discover, organize, and reuse professional prompts for every workflow.

items.title: Image Generation
items.description: Generate, edit, enhance, and transform images using modern AI models.

items.title: Document Intelligence
items.description: Summarize, analyze, translate, generate, and understand PDFs and documents.

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.description: Build intelligent workflows that automate repetitive tasks.

items.title: Developer Platform
items.description: Integrate AI into websites, applications, and services with powerful APIs and SDKs.

platform.title: One Platform. Unlimited Possibilities.
platform.description: Murphy is designed to be the central hub for artificial intelligence. Instead of switching between multiple tools, developers and organizations can manage AI models, prompts, agents, workflows, APIs, and projects from a single workspace.

integrations.title: Bring Your Own AI
integrations.description: Use your own API keys or connect supported AI providers to power every Murphy feature with the model that best fits your needs.

developers.title: Built for Developers
developers.description: Create AI-powered applications with APIs, SDKs, templates, documentation, and reusable components that reduce development time.

security.title: Privacy & Security
security.description: Your API keys, projects, and data remain under your control. Murphy is designed with secure integrations, encrypted communication, and privacy-first principles.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To create the world's most complete AI ecosystem where anyone can build, integrate, learn, and deploy artificial intelligence without unnecessary complexity.

cta.title: Start Building with Murphy
cta.description: Join developers, creators, and businesses building the next generation of AI-powered applications.
